title: Does the abelian group C_3 x C_159 admit a (477,204,87)-difference set?
lean_gate_reason: Do not send this to Lean. The strongest honest claim is still only a conditional multiplier obstruction, and Lean would only formalize a proof gap. Formal sealing becomes relevant only after an unconditional multiplier proof or a different exact obstruction is supplied.
micro_paper_assessment: The exact survey row remains micro-paper eligible in principle, because a genuine exact solve would still do most of a short note. This publication audit does not certify a near-paper packet: the present artifacts only support a conditional multiplier obstruction, so the row should be cooled rather than expanded.
family_affinity: High affinity to the Gordon-Schmidt multiplier-table open-row family; proof uses a row-specific multiplier obstruction.
generalization_signal: Moderate: the multiplier-orbit plus quotient-moment template may transfer to nearby rows with the same Sylow and orbit structure, but the exact congruence clash is row-specific.
strongest_honest_claim: The current artifacts support only a conditional structural obstruction: if 13 is an unconditional multiplier for any (477,204,87)-difference set in C_3 x C_159, then the orbit-plus-quotient argument in the packet yields nonexistence. The publication audit did not certify that multiplier premise.
paper_title_hint: A Conditional 13-Multiplier Obstruction for the (477,204,87) Difference-Set Case in C_3 x C_159
candidate_theorem_slice: If 13 is an unconditional multiplier for any (477,204,87)-difference set in C_3 x C_159, then no such difference set exists.
next_action: Move this row aside rather than expanding it. Reopen only if an unconditional 13-multiplier proof for this exact row or a different exact obstruction is supplied explicitly.
